---
title: "{{< iconify ooui articles-rtl >}} Publications" 
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, subtitle, author, categories, date]
  image-align: left
  date-format: "YYYY"
  # image-height: 10em
  page-size: 100

format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

---
